title: DARLING in the FRANXX
description:
In a distant future where humanity lives inside massive mobile cities to survive against mysterious creatures known as Klaxosaurs, children are raised only to pilot giant weapons called FRANXX. Hiro, once considered a gifted pilot, loses his confidence after failing to synchronize with his partner and begins believing he no longer has a purpose. His life changes when he meets Zero Two, a mysterious and dangerous girl with Klaxosaur blood known for being feared by everyone around her.

After becoming Zero Two’s partner, Hiro returns to the battlefield and joins a squad of young pilots struggling to understand emotions, relationships, and the meaning of living in a controlled world. As battles against the Klaxosaurs grow more intense, hidden truths about humanity, the FRANXX program, and Zero Two’s past slowly come to light. Filled with action, romance, emotional drama, and science fiction themes, DARLING in the FRANXX tells a story about love, identity, sacrifice, and what it truly means to be human.
